_description: Grader definitions for triage scoring. Consumed by scorer.py, NOT loaded into LLM context.

description_not_stub.description: Description is a placeholder or under 50 chars
description_not_stub.message: Description is a placeholder. Fill in all template sections.

has_template_structure.description: No SECO template headings found (ADF or plain text)

symptom_present.description: Symptom section is empty or N/A
symptom_present.message: Symptom section is empty or N/A.

environment_product.description: No product identified in environment or text

environment_version.description: No version number (X.Y.Z) found in text

hypothesis_present.description: Hypothesis section is N/A or empty

evidence_present.description: Evidence/Detail section is N/A or empty
evidence_present.message: Evidence/Detail section is N/A or empty.

logs_present.description: No logs attached or linked (support bundles, build logs, product logs, thread dumps)
logs_present.message: No logs provided. Attach support bundle, build logs, or relevant product logs.

error_has_message.description: Error mentioned but no error text/stack trace inline
error_has_message.message: Error mentioned but no error text/stack trace inline.

performance_has_metrics.description: Performance issue mentioned without timing/sizing data

reproduction_present.description: Bug-like issue but reproduction steps are N/A
reproduction_present.message: Bug-like issue but reproduction steps are N/A.

regression_context.message: Bug reported without regression context (when did this last work?).

change_context.message: Bug reported without change context (what changed before it broke?).

summary_descriptive.description: Summary between 30-50 chars (could be more specific)
summary_descriptive.message_template: Summary is {length} chars, could be more specific.

zendesk_linked.description: No Zendesk ticket linked via customfield_12400

ops_request_misrouted.description: Ticket looks like an admin/ops request, not a support engineering case
ops_request_misrouted.message: This looks like an admin/ops request (not a support engineering case). Consider moving to the appropriate ops queue.

issue_type_clear.description: Issue type unclear (bug/question/RFE indicators mixed or absent)
issue_type_clear.message: Issue type unclear (bug/question/RFE indicators mixed or absent).

ask_specific.description: What help is needed section is vague or missing
ask_specific.message: "What help is needed" is vague or missing.

impact_assessment.description: No impact assessment (scope, workaround, affected users)

related_tickets_linked.description: No related tickets referenced (issuelinks or inline)
